# LovelyJoy (爱儿采) - Complete Company Information

## About LovelyJoy
LovelyJoy (爱儿采) is one of China's most trusted plush toy manufacturers, founded in 2003 in Yiwu, Zhejiang — the world's capital of small commodities. With 20+ years of expertise, we serve global brands including CVS, Burlington, Kellytoy, Miniso International, and The Green Party (凯蓝), shipping millions of units annually.

What makes us different: we are a true one-stop partner. Most factories only manufacture — we cover the entire journey from your initial idea to finished product on shelf. Our in-house design team (50+ designers), flexible 200-piece trial orders, and "client-first" pricing (free design for MOQ orders, sample costs deducted from first order) make us the ideal partner for both startups and established brands.

Our mission is "Feel the Lovely, Spread the Joy" — delivering love and warmth through every product.

## Major Clients
CVS, Burlington, Kellytoy, Miniso International, The Green Party (凯蓝), and hundreds of brands across 30+ countries. We are also a licensed manufacturer for globally recognized IPs including Sanrio Hello Kitty, Disney Paw Patrol, and Illumination Minions. 85%+ of our clients place repeat orders within 12 months.

## Factory Specifications
- Factory area: 20,000+ square meters
- In-house design team: 15+ professional designers
- Skilled workers: 300+
- Monthly production capacity: 500,000+ pieces
- Annual output: Millions of units
- Export markets: 30+ countries and regions
- Client retention rate: 85%+
- Defect rate: Consistently below 1%
- Address: No.8 Siyuan Road, Niansan Li, Yiwu, Zhejiang, China
- Showroom: 4F-84556, Gate 188, Global Digital Trade Center, Yiwu

## Product Catalog

### Spring Duck (春游鸭)
- Category: Plush Toy
- Description: An adorable plush duck wearing a yellow beret and striped bandana, perfect for spring outings. Crafted with premium soft fabric.
- Material: Crystal Super Soft / PP Cotton
- Available sizes: 25cm, 35cm, 50cm
- Customizable: Colors, sizes, logo

### Sitting Puppy (蹲姿小狗)
- Category: Plush Toy
- Description: A fluffy curly-haired puppy in a charming sitting pose with a pink bow and sun hat. Ultra-soft plush material.
- Material: Long Pile Plush / PP Cotton
- Available sizes: 28cm, 40cm

### Cat Neck Pillow Series (猫咪U型枕系列)
- Category: Pillow
- Description: Cute cat-shaped U-shaped neck pillows in three adorable designs. Perfect for travel and napping.
- Material: Spandex / Memory Foam
- Available sizes: 30cm × 28cm

### Soft Bean Bag Series (软萌豆袋系列)
- Category: Plush Toy
- Description: A collection of round, squishy bean bag plush toys featuring a dinosaur, bunny, and kitten. Palm-sized companions.
- Material: Minky Fabric / PP Cotton + Beads
- Available sizes: 12cm, 18cm

### Piggy Series (小猪系列)
- Category: Plush Toy
- Description: A delightful collection of pink piggy plush toys in various outfits and costumes with interchangeable accessories.
- Material: Crystal Super Soft / PP Cotton
- Available sizes: 20cm, 30cm, 45cm

### White Goose (大白鹅)
- Category: Plush Toy
- Description: An elegant white goose plush toy with a graceful long neck and soft feather-like texture. Unique and eye-catching design.
- Material: Crystal Super Soft / PP Cotton
- Available sizes: 35cm, 50cm, 75cm

### Baby Penguin (小企鹅)
- Category: Plush Toy
- Description: A cute baby penguin plush toy with a cozy hat and scarf. Designed with attention to detail for maximum cuteness.
- Material: Crystal Super Soft / PP Cotton
- Available sizes: 25cm, 35cm, 50cm

### Animal Trio (动物三人组)
- Category: Plush Toy
- Description: A charming trio of animal friends featuring a koala, lamb, and puppy. Collectible set with matching style.
- Material: Crystal Super Soft / PP Cotton
- Available sizes: 25cm, 35cm

### Character Collection (换装系列)
- Category: Gift
- Description: Customizable character plush toys with interchangeable outfits. Perfect for brand collaborations and promotional gifts.
- Material: Crystal Super Soft / PP Cotton
- Available sizes: 20cm, 30cm

## OEM/ODM Manufacturing Process

### Step 1: Requirement Discussion
We start by understanding your needs — design concepts, target market, quantity, and timeline. Our team provides professional recommendations based on your brief.

### Step 2: Concept Design
Our in-house design team creates original artwork and 3D renderings, or works from your provided designs. Multiple revision rounds included.

### Step 3: Sample Confirmation
We produce physical samples for your review and approval. Sample development takes 7-15 working days depending on complexity.

### Step 4: Material Sourcing
Premium materials are carefully selected and tested. All fabrics undergo safety testing to meet international standards.

### Step 5: Mass Production
Full-scale manufacturing with dedicated quality control at every stage. Standard production takes 30-45 days after sample approval.

### Step 6: Quality Inspection
100% product inspection before packaging. We follow AQL standards and provide detailed inspection reports.

### Step 7: Packaging & Shipping
Professional packaging solutions with safe and efficient logistics delivery worldwide. FOB, CIF, and DDP terms available.

## Quality Certifications
1. **BSCI** — Business Social Compliance Initiative: Ensures ethical labor practices and social responsibility
2. **ISO 9001** — Quality Management System: Guarantees consistent quality control processes
3. **CE** — European Safety Certification: Products meet EU safety and health requirements
4. **ASTM F963** — US Toy Safety Standard: Compliance with American toy safety regulations
5. **EN 71** — EU Toy Safety Standard: Products safe for children per European standards
6. **GB 6675** — China Toy Safety Standard: Meets Chinese national toy safety requirements

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
Our standard MOQ is 500 pieces per style. For new customers, we offer flexible small-batch trial orders starting from 200 pieces to help you test the market.

### How long does sample development take?
Sample development typically takes 7-15 working days depending on complexity. Simple modifications to existing designs can be completed in as fast as 5 days.

### What is the production lead time?
Standard production takes 30-45 days after sample approval. Rush orders can be arranged within 20 days for an additional fee, subject to production schedule availability.

### What certifications do your products have?
Our products meet ASTM F963 (US), EN 71 (EU), CE, and GB 6675 (China) safety standards. Our factory holds BSCI and ISO 9001 certifications.

### Do you offer design services (ODM)?
Yes! Our in-house design team can create original designs from scratch based on your brief, or modify existing designs. We provide 3D renderings and physical samples before mass production.

### What payment methods do you accept?
We accept T/T (bank transfer), L/C (letter of credit), and PayPal. Standard terms are 30% deposit with 70% balance before shipment.

### What materials do you use?
We primarily use Crystal Super Soft fabric, Long Pile Plush, Minky Fabric, and Spandex for our products. Filling materials include PP Cotton, Memory Foam, and PP Cotton + Beads for bean bag styles. All materials are tested for safety compliance.

### Can you customize packaging?
Yes, we offer full packaging customization including custom boxes, hang tags, labels, shopping bags, and branded packaging materials. Our design team can create packaging that matches your brand identity.

### Do you handle shipping and logistics?
Yes, we provide end-to-end logistics support. We can arrange FOB (Free on Board), CIF (Cost, Insurance, Freight), and DDP (Delivered Duty Paid) shipping terms. We work with major international logistics providers.

### What is your quality control process?
We implement quality control at every stage: incoming material inspection, in-process quality checks, final product inspection (100% inspection), and pre-shipment audit. We follow AQL 2.5 standards and provide detailed inspection reports with photos.
